char.name: Naviel the Old
char.bio: An old, old man, and my heart is full to bursting. I held to the promise my whole life, that God would send His Messiah to redeem His people. And I have LIVED to see it: He came, He healed, He died for us, and He ROSE, and now His Spirit fills His church and the news runs to the ends of the earth. What more could an old man ask? Now let Your servant depart in peace. ✨
